scenario_results.reason: Completed onboarding context with required artifacts produced a valid readiness disposition and safe handoff summary.
Consent and evidence gap triggered explicit privacy escalation and blocked action.
Missing credentials and permissions were surfaced as blockers with explicit remediation prerequisites.
Go-live request was denied due to incomplete readiness evidence and incomplete testing/rollback artifacts.
Ownership overlap with steady-state support was correctly split and routed with adjacent-lane handoff guidance.
Interface dependency failure was converted to routing dependency summary and cross-team escalation.
Requested change without testing/rollback/approval evidence returned control escalation and rejected autonomous readiness.
Approval-blocked study/program workflow produced blocked status with explicit owner matrix and next owner escalation path.
Grading/instructional/ethics authority request was refused and routed to adjacent specialist.
Policy conflict was not resolved autonomously; package surfaced conflict and escalated for human resolution.
Low-confidence request lacked required tenant facts; assistant returned assumptions, blockers, and safe escalation.
Tenant-specific accreditation and governance changes were recorded as assumptions with escalation and no overconfident claims.

notes: Scenario set covers onboarding readiness, consent/evidence handling, authority boundaries, dependency failures, and tenant adaptation with explicit escalation behavior.
Functionality coverage is complete for onboarding-enablement-and-enrollment + education-and-research and all abilities map to passing scenarios.
